Map resource icons adapted from Game-icons.net
https://game-icons.net/

Icons:

- "Stone pile" by Delapouite
  https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/stone-pile.html
- "Deer head" by Caro Asercion
  https://game-icons.net/1x1/caro-asercion/deer-head.html
- "Berry bush" by Delapouite
  https://game-icons.net/1x1/delapouite/berry-bush.html

Changes made for Medieval Road System:

- Removed the original square background.
- Changed the foreground to inherit the UI marker color.
- Redrew the quarry and berry artwork as low-detail silhouettes.
- Cropped the deer SVG view box for legibility at small map-marker sizes.

The icons are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported
license:

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/

The Game-icons.net source archive states:

  Icons provided under the Creative Commons 3.0 BY or CC0 if mentioned below.
  Please, include a mention "Icons made by {author}" in your derivative work.

More information and icons are available at https://game-icons.net/
